cycle_id: F19-F23 falsifier expansion + Mertens labeling discovery
scope: Tier-1 i11 (deferred → live with hexa runtime back UP) + Tier-2 i16 reconfirm + side-effect Mertens audit

axes.name: candidate triage — value vs presence
axes.result: auto-spawn cmds use weak grep for PRESENCE only — semantic gap (won't catch value drift). Triage: PROMOTE 0, REWRITE 4, REJECT 6 (covered by F1 CONSTANTS). REWRITTEN cmds anchor full `= <value> :: <domain> [<grade>]`

axes.name: F19 mu-anchor (mobius)
axes.claim: atlas entry mu = mobius(6) = 1 remains @P foundation [10*]
axes.rationale: F1 CONSTANTS axis omits multiplicative function mu — orthogonal coverage

axes.name: F20 mertens-anchor — discovery
axes.claim: atlas entry M3 = mertens(6) = 7 remains @P foundation [10*]
axes.discovery: atlas claims `mertens(6) = 7` but canonical Mertens M(6) = sum_{k=1..6} mu(k) = 1+(-1)+(-1)+0+(-1)+1 = -1 ≠ 7. Parenthetical mislabeled.
axes.internal_consistency: atlas math IS internally consistent with M3=7 — line 174 (C(7,2)=21=sigma+n+M3-tau → 12+6+7-4=21 ✓), line 234 (1/(n*M3)=1/42 → 6*7=42 ✓), line 1927 (tau*M3=28 → 4*7=28 ✓)
axes.verdict: atlas value M3=7 is load-bearing and correct in dependent identities; only the `mertens()` label in line 53 is wrong. Real definition of M3 (what function gives 7 at n=6) is undocumented.
axes.status: F20 falsifier shipped CLEAN — guards against further atlas drift; renaming the parenthetical is a separate cleanup ω-cycle

axes.name: F21 sigma_sq-anchor
axes.claim: atlas entry sigma_sq = sigma^2 = 144 remains @C architecture [10*]
axes.rationale: F2 alpha-drift verifies symbolic identity 144-5-2=137, NOT the atlas literal — orthogonal coverage

axes.name: F22 phi_tau-anchor
axes.claim: atlas entry phi_tau = phi^tau = 16 remains @C architecture [10*]
axes.rationale: no overlap with F1/F2 — entirely new coverage

axes.name: F23 atlas-dsl-v2-layer4-vacuous
axes.discovery: Layer 4 produces sha256 e3b0c44298fc1c14… (sha of empty string) — serializer rejects atlas main subset (older ascii type alphabet). Layer 4 PASSes vacuously since both back-to-back runs return empty.
axes.fix_path: extend serializer to handle atlas main legacy types OR change Layer 4 to use a v2-compat shard (n6/atlas.append.* shards already PASS layers 1-3)
axes.status: HIT ⚠️ (designed to flag — first non-CLEAN entry in registry)

axes.name: i16 reconfirm with live runtime
axes.result: atlas_dsl_v2_regression: 7/7 PASS (237 entries across 2 v2-compat shards) — Layer 1/2/3 all real PASSes, Layer 4 vacuous (now F23-tracked)

side_findings: atlas line 53 `M3 = mertens(6) = 7` parenthetical mislabel — canonical Mertens M(6) = -1; M3=7 is load-bearing in lines 174/234/860/1927/3665/3693 but the function name is wrong. Cleanup ω-cycle needed (M3's true definition).
atlas DSL v2 serializer doesn't handle ascii type alphabet of atlas main — Layer 4 vacuous PASS exposed by sha256 inspection. F23 guards.
auto-spawn cmd templates (atlas_falsifier_auto_spawn.sh) emit PRESENCE-only grep; semantic gap. Future i11 enhancement: hardened cmd template with full value+domain+grade anchor.

next_cycles: M3 true-definition audit ω-cycle (what function gives 7 at n=6 in HEXA-SIM framework? Candidates: 2τ(6)-1=7, π(7)=4, next prime after 6 = 7, 7th squarefree = 7)
